mapper.select: SELECT * FROM global_voices WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND folder_id IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO global_voices ( voice_id, user_id, folder_id, name, description, gender, language, voice_type, qwen_voice_id, custom_voice_url, custom_voice_media_id, voice_prompt, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{voiceId}, #{userId}, #{folderId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{gender}, #{language}, #{voiceType}, #{qwenVoiceId}, #{customVoiceUrl}, #{customVoiceMediaId}, #{voicePrompt}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE global_voices SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, folder_id = #{folderId}, qwen_voice_id = #{qwenVoiceId}, voice_type = #{voiceType}, custom_voice_url = #{customVoiceUrl}, gender = #{gender}, language = #{language}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE voice_id = #{voiceId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM global_voices WHERE voice_id = #{voiceId} AND user_id = #{userId}
